title: Filter node modifies GPS fields unexpectedly
symptom: The filter node is changing the values of gpslat and gpslon to empty strings instead of filtering them correctly. This results in incorrect output records.
not_this_if: Filter node is configured correctly to retrieve empty fields
root_cause: The filter node is incorrectly processing the input data, leading to unintended modifications of the JSON objects. This can happen if the filter conditions are not set up properly or if the node has a bug.
fix_steps: Use the Google Sheets node's built-in filter to retrieve records directly
Set the filter to only include records where gpslon or gpslat are empty
Test the workflow to ensure it retrieves the correct records
agent_instruction: Switch to using the Google Sheets node's built-in filter to get records with empty GPS fields.
